findingCodes.description: The tagging manifest JSON does not validate against tagging.schema.json.
findingCodes.remediation: Re-run tag-builder to produce a valid tagging.json, then re-run pdf-writer. Check that the tagging contract has not drifted from the schema.

findingCodes.description: The tagging tree root element is not of type 'Document'. PDF/UA requires a Document root.
findingCodes.remediation: Ensure tag-builder emits a root node with type 'Document'. Inspect tagging.json to verify root.type === 'Document'.

findingCodes.description: The writer manifest does not claim native tagging was applied. The PDF may only have a sidecar manifest without embedded structure.
findingCodes.remediation: Run pdf-writer with the PDFBox backend to inject native structure tree and marked-content operators into the output PDF.

findingCodes.description: PDF metadata stream (XMP) and document information dictionary are inconsistent.
findingCodes.remediation: Ensure pdf-writer synchronizes XMP metadata with the Info dictionary. This finding may be auto-suppressed if the validator's metadata probe confirms consistency (known veraPDF false positive with PDFBox output).

findingCodes.description: PDF/UA identification not properly set in XMP metadata.
findingCodes.remediation: Ensure pdf-writer sets pdfuaid:part in the XMP metadata. This finding may be auto-suppressed if the validator's metadata probe confirms the identification is present.
Inspect the veraPDF report details for the specific check context. Common causes: missing StructTreeRoot, incorrect role mapping, or missing /MarkInfo.

findingCodes.description: Content not properly tagged or artifacts not marked. All real content must be in the structure tree; all decorative content must be marked as Artifact.
findingCodes.remediation: Ensure all text blocks are tagged by tag-builder and pdf-writer marks decorative elements as Artifact in the structure tree.
Add alt text to figure nodes in semantic-engine or tag-builder. Every <Figure> in the structure tree must have an /Alt entry.

findingCodes.description: Table structure violation. Tables must use TH/TD within TR within Table.
findingCodes.remediation: Ensure layout-analyzer correctly identifies table cells and tag-builder produces proper Table > TR > TH/TD hierarchy.

findingCodes.description: Missing or incorrect natural language specification. All content must declare its language.
findingCodes.remediation: Ensure pdf-writer sets /Lang on the document catalog and on structure elements when the language changes. Use semantic-engine languageHint or auto-detection.

findingCodes.description: Font not properly embedded or CIDSet descriptor present for subsetted CID font.
findingCodes.remediation: Enable stripCidSet in the pdfWriter profile config. Ensure all fonts are fully embedded. Check OVERLAY_FONT_PATH for a valid embeddable font.
